creator: babak@farrokhi.net
text:
Update to 1.0.45:

--- gsk.patch begins here ---
diff -ruN gsk.orig/Makefile gsk/Makefile
--- gsk.orig/Makefile	Mon Oct 30 01:24:25 2006
+++ gsk/Makefile	Mon Oct 30 01:24:52 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gsk
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.40
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.45
 CATEGORIES=	net devel
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
diff -ruN gsk.orig/distinfo gsk/distinfo
--- gsk.orig/distinfo	Mon Oct 30 01:24:25 2006
+++ gsk/distinfo	Mon Oct 30 01:25:13 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (gsk-1.0.40.tar.gz) = 4133f7d51bb1140a599e2521cf888f68
-SHA256 (gsk-1.0.40.tar.gz) =
45aaf36cb1086d926911ba7e161ef30fc0fb505639d58b9d577c07f5df1ffba6
-SIZE (gsk-1.0.40.tar.gz) = 1225722
+MD5 (gsk-1.0.45.tar.gz) = ec5367bdaa8a19cf5f32432de551403b
+SHA256 (gsk-1.0.45.tar.gz) =
33c7af45373223d29bd86fa3674a7c0b7ef0991ba1a0531789325b8e02165dc7
+SIZE (gsk-1.0.45.tar.gz) = 1506551
diff -ruN gsk.orig/pkg-plist gsk/pkg-plist
--- gsk.orig/pkg-plist	Mon Oct 30 01:24:25 2006
+++ gsk/pkg-plist	Mon Oct 30 01:24:31 2006
@@ -44,9 +44,9 @@
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskqsortmacro.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskrbtreemacros.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskrequest.h
-include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskshutdown.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gsksimplefilter.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gsksocketaddress.h
+include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gsksocketaddresssymbolic.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskstdio.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskstream.h
 include/gsk-1.0/gsk/gskstreamclient.h
--- gsk.patch ends here ---
